name: sim_rosetta_five_frameworks_self_similarity

P1_admissible_set_decreases.interpretation: all five frameworks show ratchet narrowing of admissible set

P2_convergence_to_fixed_point.interpretation: each framework converges toward a fixed point under repeated ratcheting

P3_irreversibility.interpretation: ratchet is irreversible in both frameworks; once eliminated, cannot be restored

P4_all_five_same_graph_structure.interpretation: all five frameworks have identical 3-node ratchet structure = self-similarity

P5_convergence_rate_vs_entropy.interpretation: convergence rate co-varies with initial entropy = Axis 0 as entropy gradient

P6_sympy_convergence_theorem.interpretation: finite ratchet converges in at most n steps; symbolic proof

N1_z3_unsat_ratchet_increases_set.interpretation: UNSAT: impossible for valid ratchet to increase admissible set; monotone by construction

N2_holodeck_cannot_grow_admissible_set.interpretation: Bayesian update cannot expand the admissible set; only narrow

N3_science_falsified_cannot_return.interpretation: once falsified, hypothesis cannot re-enter the admissible set

N4_no_elimination_means_no_convergence.interpretation: ratchet with zero elimination per step never converges; elimination is necessary

N5_igt_non_dominated_survives.interpretation: ratchet only eliminates dominated strategies; non-dominated candidates survive

B1_max_to_one_fixed_point.interpretation: maximum admissible set converges to exactly one fixed point

B2_clifford_grade_ratchet.interpretation: Clifford grade-ratchet converges to grade-0 scalar = minimal constraint state

B3_rustworkx_self_similar_subgraphs.interpretation: all 5 framework subgraphs are isomorphic = self-similarity confirmed

B4_xgi_five_framework_hyperedges.interpretation: 6-way + 5 bilateral hyperedges: Rosetta invariant connects all frameworks

B5_teleological_selection_to_one.interpretation: teleological selection: from n possible states, the ratchet converges to exactly 1; this IS the selection process the owner describes

rosetta_claim: Holodeck, QIT, Science, IGT, and Leviathan all share the structural invariant: 'constraint narrows admissible set -> ratchet -> irreversibility'. They are self-similar (isomorphic 3-node subgraphs). The convergence rate co-varies with entropy = Axis 0. This IS teleological selection at every scale.
